body.content:
Dear Abdalah and Finn,

 

We well noted your proposal. However, the location code affects many modules/functions in Allegro system, such as Marine Team-Vessel Schedule, EQC & Agent Management Team – Terminal and Yard Agreement, Empty Reposition,  Trade(Freight Contract) , as well as Booking and eService. Therefore, please contact all the relevant teams and confirm us the location change for the port of Dekhela.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


发送时间: 2026年3月11日 18:51
收件人: Abdallah Radwan <abdallah.radwan@seagloryegypt.com>; Catherine Kang/CUL-C
